title: China's Initiative: A View from Ukraine
description:
Corrected transcript available here: http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/media/chinas-initiative-view-ukraine/ 

Doctor of Economics, MP (1994-2002) and Chairwoman of the Progressive Socialist Party of Ukraine, Dr. Natalia Vitrenko's address to the Schiller Institute's conference, "Fulfilling the Dream of Mankind", in Bad Soden, Germany, November 25 & 26, 2017. For the full conference proceedings visit, http://newparadigm.schillerinstitute.com/fulfilling-dream-mankind/
